strategies.title: 4-7-8 Breathing
strategies.description: Inhale for 4s, hold for 7s, exhale for 8s.

strategies.title: 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding
strategies.description: Name 5 things you see, 4 you feel, 3 you hear, etc.

strategies.title: Progressive Muscle Relaxation
strategies.description: Tense and relax each muscle group.

strategies.title: Expressive Journaling
strategies.description: Write down your thoughts without filtering.

strategies.title: Call a Friend
strategies.description: Reach out to someone you trust for a quick chat.

strategies.title: Take a Time Out
strategies.description: Step away from the situation for 15 minutes.

strategies.title: Vigorous Exercise
strategies.description: Go for a brisk walk or run to burn off adrenaline.

strategies.title: Write it and Rip it
strategies.description: Write down what made you angry, then tear up the paper.

strategies.title: Fact Checking
strategies.description: Write down the fear, then write down the logical facts against it.

strategies.title: Safe Space Visualization
strategies.description: Close your eyes and imagine a place where you feel completely safe.

strategies.title: Time Blocking
strategies.description: Break down your overwhelming tasks into 15-minute chunks.

strategies.title: Nature Walk
strategies.description: Spend 20 minutes walking outside without your phone.
